patch.value: pm plan create: repeated --step silently keeps only the last value instead of accumulating steps

Dogfood finding 2026-06-10: pm plan create --step A --step B --step C creates ONE step (C, last-wins) because --step aliases single-value --step-title. Agents naturally express multi-step plans in one command; repeated --step should accumulate into ordered steps (commander collect, NOT list:true per pm-1lws learning). Workaround: pm plan add-step per step.
